name: email-verifier
title: Email Verifier & Deliverability Checker
description: Bulk email verification. Checks syntax, MX, SMTP, catch-all, disposable and role accounts, and returns a deliverability score per address. Pay only per verified email. CRM and cold-email ready; agent-payable via x402.

meta.seoDescription: Verify emails in bulk: syntax, MX, SMTP, catch-all, disposable and role-account checks plus a 0-100 deliverability score. Cut bounces before cold outreach. Pay per verified email.
